report_metadata.title: Huione Pay Infrastructure — Live Evidence Summary (Sanitized for Public Disclosure)
report_metadata.purpose: Demonstrate active Huione Pay infrastructure at time of research
report_metadata.note: Raw evidence with full server responses, C2 contract data, and IP details is maintained in a private evidence package shared only under responsible disclosure agreements.

critical_findings.finding: S3 bucket publicly readable — exposes server IP configuration
critical_findings.details: Bucket stores IP routing configuration used by the app. No authentication required.

critical_findings.finding: Primary API server active and accepting unauthenticated requests
critical_findings.details: Server responds to public endpoints without TLS client certificate.

critical_findings.finding: BSC smart contract used as C2 URL storage mechanism
critical_findings.details: Contract stores a URL that the app fetches as a C2 configuration endpoint. The URL is encoded in contract bytecode, making it resistant to domain takedowns. Contract address and decoded C2 URL are in the private evidence package.

critical_findings.finding: CAPTCHA completely disabled on authentication endpoint
critical_findings.details: /foundation/user/checkManMachine returns empty response — bot protection not operational.

critical_findings.finding: Direct backend IP access bypasses CDN/WAF
critical_findings.details: Backend accepts connections on port 19003 directly via IP. WAF/CDN can be bypassed entirely.

critical_findings.finding: Huione Chain RPC publicly accessible without authentication
critical_findings.details: RPC node at rpc.huione.org responds to all standard Solana RPC methods without auth.

critical_findings.finding: MQTT broker active for real-time transaction events
critical_findings.details: WebSocket MQTT accepts connections. Message topics and authentication details in private evidence package.

full_evidence_available_to: Law enforcement upon valid legal request
private_evidence_contents: Full HTTP response bodies and headers
BSC C2 contract address and decoded URL
MQTT broker connection details and observed topics
SHA-256 hashes of all responses for tamper evidence
disclosure_note.contact: See SECURITY.md for responsible disclosure contact
